title: Security Layer — Hardware-Backed Vault, Air-Gap, Provenance + CLI Store + Trace Rewrite

test_results.delta_from_session_27: +37 new tests (security) +2 migration fixes +1 recall fix = net +37

A.title: Swift octane-auth Binary (Touch ID + macOS Keychain)
A.description: Compiled Swift CLI binary for hardware-backed key storage. All vault keys live in the macOS Keychain protected by SecAccessControlCreateWithFlags(.biometryCurrentSet, kSecAttrAccessibleWhenPasscodeSetThisDeviceOnly). Touch ID prompt is shown for every key retrieval. Keys are physically inaccessible without enrolled fingerprint or device passcode.

vault.file_format: OVLT magic (4B) + version byte (1B) + nonce (12B) + GCM ciphertext
vault.key_retrieval: Calls octane-auth retrieve via subprocess.run(), raw bytes via bytes.fromhex(value)

airgap.mechanism: Path.exists() on ~/.octane/.airgap — single call on every outbound request

provenance.function: build_provenance(source, command, trace_id, model, agent, session_id, depth, **extras) -> dict
provenance.captures: is_airgap_active() at call time, timestamp, all context fields

C.title: CLI Commands — vault, airgap, audit
C.audit_command: octane audit <finding-id> — queries Postgres provenance JSONB and renders ProvenanceRecord.format()

D.title: Migration 28A — Provenance JSONB Columns
sql: ALTER TABLE web_pages ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS provenance JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'
ALTER TABLE research_findings_v2 ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS provenance JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'
ALTER TABLE generated_artifacts ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS provenance JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_web_pages_provenance ON web_pages USING GIN (provenance)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_rfv2_provenance ON research_findings_v2 USING GIN (provenance)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_artifacts_provenance ON generated_artifacts USING GIN (provenance)

E.title: Security Tests
test_classes: TestEncryptionRoundTrip (4) — roundtrip, wrong key raises, tampered ciphertext raises, unique nonces
TestVaultFileFormat (5) — write+read, magic header, invalid magic raises, permissions 600, missing file raises
TestVaultManager (10) — create, duplicate raises, write+read, missing key returns None, read_all, delete_key, vault not found raises, exists, list_vaults, setup error when binary missing
TestIsAirgapActive (2) — inactive when no file, active when file exists

TestAirgapManager (11) — enable creates flag, permissions 600, status inactive/active, disable, disable when not active, cycle, guard raises when active, guard passes when inactive, corrupted flag file, multiple enables idempotent
TestBuildProvenance (5) — basic structure, airgap flag captured, extras included, record roundtrip, optional fields excluded when empty

F.title: Bug Fixes — Missing CLI Commands

bugs_fixed.fix: Added --list / -l flag to trace command; delegates to list view (same as no-arg behaviour)
Implemented research_library command: groups all tasks with last 2 findings previewed per task
Implemented research_recall command: ILIKE search on research_findings, falls back to web_pages when no findings exist

F.store_added_to_research_store: search_findings(query, limit) — Postgres ILIKE across content + topic columns

G.title: octane trace — Full Rewrite
problems_fixed: Table format replaced with sequential event stream — each event is a labeled block with full payload on indented sub-lines
Query text now appears in header
URLs, follow-up queries, output previews no longer truncated to 90 chars
Waterfall ASCII bar chart added at end — event fire-times as horizontal bars scaled to total duration
List view now shows query text under each trace ID

new_structure.header: query, started, ended (+Xms), routing reason, agents, status
new_structure.event_format: T+Xms  LABEL  source -> target / full payload on sub-lines
new_structure.waterfall: ASCII bar per event: position proportional to offset_ms / total_ms
new_structure.verbose: --verbose / -v expands full URL lists (all discovered + extracted/skipped tags)

G.backward_compat: _EVENT_COLOURS aliased to _COLOUR, _EVENT_ICONS aliased to _LABEL, _print_verbose_web_trace kept as no-op stub in main.py re-exports

H.title: octane store — New Command Group
H.motivation: research recall/library only query perpetual research tasks — which the user had not started. But octane ask already stores every fetched page in Postgres web_pages. This group exposes that corpus.
commands: octane store stats   — row counts for all Postgres tables + Redis namespace counts + memory usage
octane store pages [query]   — browse/search web_pages (all URLs ever fetched by web agent)
octane store redis   — Redis key namespaces with counts and sample keys

files_modified: octane/cli/__init__.py — added vault, airgap, audit, store imports + add_typer calls
octane/cli/trace.py — full rewrite: event stream, waterfall, no emojis
octane/cli/research.py — added library + recall commands; recall falls back to web_pages
octane/main.py — updated backward-compat re-exports for renamed _COLOUR/_LABEL, added _print_verbose_web_trace no-op stub
tests/unit/test_tools/test_migrations.py — updated noop test to feed both versions, updated version assertion to 28A

architecture_notes.vault_key_flow: VaultManager.read(vault, key) -> _get_key(vault, reason) -> subprocess octane-auth retrieve -> bytes.fromhex -> AESGCM.decrypt -> plaintext
architecture_notes.airgap_hot_path: is_airgap_active() = Path('~/.octane/.airgap').exists() — single syscall, no subprocess
architecture_notes.provenance_storage: JSONB column on web_pages/research_findings_v2/generated_artifacts with GIN indexes — queryable with ->> operators
architecture_notes.store_commands_use_pg_client: store.py uses PgClient directly (same as files.py/project.py), not ResearchStore — avoids Redis dependency for simple table queries

session_29_plan.title: Portfolio Management
session_29_plan.security: Portfolio data gated behind finance vault (Touch ID on read)
